description: An active, compassionate connection characterized by deep understanding, care, and a desire for the well-being of the other. It is seen as a fundamental binding force in the universe.
rationale: The word 'lothea' is foundational. It begins with 'lo' (toward), moves through the contemplative fricative 'the' (Buddhist), and resolves in the open vowel 'a'. The structure sonically represents a mindful, caring movement toward another that results in open, shared presence.
